_meta.purpose: Maps a major to academically RELATED majors a student may want to compare. These are NOT recommendations — just adjacent fields. Status: Estimated (hand-curated, not from an official crosswalk yet).
_meta.disclaimer: Similar majors are related academic options to compare, not final recommendations. The right move depends on the student's own fit signals.

Political Science.name: Public Policy
Political Science.relation: Applied side of politics — how decisions get made and implemented.

Political Science.name: Economics
Political Science.relation: Shares quantitative + institutional reasoning; common double-major.

Political Science.name: History
Political Science.relation: Context and cause behind political systems.

Political Science.name: Sociology
Political Science.relation: Power, institutions, and society from a social-science angle.

Political Science.name: Philosophy
Political Science.relation: Theory, ethics, and argument that underpin political thought.

Political Science.name: Pre-Law
Political Science.relation: Common pre-professional track for poli-sci students.

Computer Science.name: Data Science
Computer Science.relation: Programming applied to data, statistics, and ML.

Computer Science.name: Software Engineering
Computer Science.relation: More applied build/ship focus than theory.

Computer Science.name: Computer Engineering
Computer Science.relation: Adds hardware, circuits, and embedded systems.

Computer Science.name: Information Systems
Computer Science.relation: Tech in a business / organizational context.

Computer Science.name: Applied Mathematics
Computer Science.relation: Shares the theoretical and proof-based core.

Computer Science.name: Statistics
Computer Science.relation: Quantitative foundation behind ML and analytics.

Computer Science.name: Cognitive Science
Computer Science.relation: CS plus mind, perception, and AI.

Psychology, General.name: Cognitive Science
Psychology, General.relation: Mind and behavior with a computational/neuro lens.

Psychology, General.name: Sociology
Psychology, General.relation: Behavior at the group and societal scale.

Psychology, General.name: Human Development
Psychology, General.relation: How people change across the lifespan.

Psychology, General.name: Public Health
Psychology, General.relation: Behavior and well-being at the population level.

Psychology, General.name: Social Work
Psychology, General.relation: Applied helping profession built on behavioral science.

Psychology.name: Cognitive Science
Psychology.relation: Mind and behavior with a computational/neuro lens.

Psychology.name: Sociology
Psychology.relation: Behavior at the group and societal scale.

Psychology.name: Human Development
Psychology.relation: How people change across the lifespan.

Psychology.name: Public Health
Psychology.relation: Behavior and well-being at the population level.

Psychology.name: Social Work
Psychology.relation: Applied helping profession built on behavioral science.

Economics.name: Data Science
Economics.relation: Quantitative analysis and modeling of real data.

Economics.name: Mathematics
Economics.relation: The formal backbone of economic theory.

Economics.name: Political Science
Economics.relation: Institutions and policy that shape markets.

Biology (Pre-Med).name: Public Health
Biology (Pre-Med).relation: Health at the population, not patient, scale.

Biology (Pre-Med).name: Neuroscience
Biology (Pre-Med).relation: Biology focused on the brain and nervous system.

Biology (Pre-Med).name: Health Sciences
Biology (Pre-Med).relation: Broader pre-health track with clinical exposure.

Biology (Pre-Med).name: Psychology
Biology (Pre-Med).relation: Behavior and mental health alongside biology.

Biology (Pre-Med).name: Kinesiology/Exercise Science
Biology (Pre-Med).relation: Human body, movement, and pre-PT/OT paths.

Mechanical Engineering.name: Civil Engineering
Mechanical Engineering.relation: Structures and physical systems at scale.

Business Administration.name: Marketing
Business Administration.relation: The customer and demand side of business.

Nursing (BSN).name: Public Health
Nursing (BSN).relation: Population health rather than bedside care.

English.name: Creative Writing
English.relation: The craft and production side of English.

English.name: Communications
English.relation: Applied writing and messaging for organizations.

English.name: History
English.relation: Narrative, sources, and analysis of the past.
